rationale: Gov't Code §2306.033 governs removal of board members for qualifications, attendance, or misconduct. It is wholly unrelated to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: Sec. 2306.033. REMOVAL OF MEMBERS. (a) It is a ground for removal from the board that a member:
_note: No relationship between the cited rule and the proposed change; rule concerns board member removal, not property tax exemptions.
